name: Trakt
author: thegoddamnbeckster
description: Import watch history, ratings, and watchlist from Trakt.tv into Chronicle.

background_tasks.description: One-time full import of your entire Trakt watch history, ratings, and watchlist.
background_tasks.run_confirmation_message: This pulls your full Trakt history and may take several minutes. Existing records will not be duplicated.

background_tasks.description: Pulls new watch events, ratings, and watchlist changes from Trakt since the last sync.
